hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q "\.tf$"; then cd terraform && terraform validate; fi'
bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q "\.sql$"; then MODEL=$(basename "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" .sql) && cd transform && dbt test --select $MODEL; fi'
hooks.statusMessage: Running dbt test on SQL model...
